svg.text: New file only. Rows are mascots, columns are working-state motion ideas. Every card is a 3-frame storyboard on fixed grids: body 8x8, spark 4x4.
Spark drifts by one pixel step. Most lively.
Spark stays in place and pulses brighter.
Spark walks around the right edge by one cell.
Softest silhouette with the safest pulse.
Shape change reads clearly at small sizes.
Feels cute, but slightly busier than blink.
More character without extra motion noise.
Best if you want the mascot to feel more alive.
Most expressive, also the busiest option here.
